text: In a crisis, the leader should combine calm communication with genuine {{c1::empathy}} so the team and the customer feel supported.
explanation: Empathy reduces panic and helps both the team and the customer stay aligned during high-stress moments.
usage: Crucial in support, operations, and incident response situations.
spanish: En una crisis, el líder debe combinar una comunicación serena con empatía genuina para que el equipo y el cliente se sientan apoyados.

text: Customers remember whether someone took {{c1::ownership}} of the issue, even when the solution is not immediate.
explanation: Ownership builds trust because it shows commitment and follow-through.
usage: Essential for support leads and managers in customer-facing roles.
spanish: Los clientes recuerdan si alguien asumió la responsabilidad del problema, incluso cuando la solución no es inmediata.

text: A good retrospective focuses on what happened, what should change, and how the team will improve the {{c1::process}}.
explanation: Retrospectives turn incidents into learning opportunities instead of blame cycles.
usage: Very important in support, engineering, and operations.
spanish: Una buena retrospectiva se centra en qué pasó, qué debería cambiar y cómo el equipo mejorará el proceso.
